base_radius_to_height.desc: 台基半径/总高（祈年殿典型约 18:34）

tier_count.desc: 台基/屋顶层级（默认三重）

aiInstruction: Radial ceremonial hall (structural_typology=radial_terrace_hall). PREFERRED: STRUCTURE + typology:radial_terrace_hall with reference_landmark=temple_of_heaven when user names Temple of Heaven. Params: baseRadius=18, tiers=3, height≈34, hallRadius≈10, facing=SOUTH. Compositional fallback: skeleton_type=RADIAL_RING, circular MASS or tiered ROOF/DOME, PAVING terrace rings. Output proportion_hints: typology=radial_terrace_hall, tier_count=3, base_radius_to_height≈0.53. symmetry=RADIAL. Do NOT use a plain rectangular box.
